hero.name: Sohrab Fadai
hero.pitch: PR, public affairs, and opinion shaping — backed by AI. 17 years of getting important messages through the noise.

pr.title: PR & Communications
pr.description: Strategic PR, public affairs, media relations, and opinion pieces. Clients placed on DN Debatt, SvD, DI Debatt, TechCrunch, and Forbes. Via Heartspace.

web.title: Web Development
web.description: Fast, modern websites with CMS. No templates, no WordPress.

ai.title: AI Implementation
ai.description: AI-powered tools for communications and analysis. Recognized by AI Sweden, accepted into Google for Startups. Not theory — implementation.

medis.title: Medis Kök & Bar
medis.description: Replaced a slow WordPress site with a modern, mobile-first experience. TheFork booking built in, 95+ PageSpeed.

parklife.title: Northern Parklife
parklife.description: Communications strategy and media relations for a Nordic outdoor company.

techarena.title: Techarena 2026
techarena.description: 100+ segmented email campaigns, Webflow site, and on-site communications for Sweden's largest tech conference.

lkr.title: LKR / SNF
lkr.description: Novus survey, opinion piece, and panel seminar.

about.title: About
about.text: Born in Tehran. Raised in Dalarna. Based in Stockholm. 17 years in Swedish public affairs — regional director at Företagarna, PR consultant at Westander, three published books. IVLP alumnus (US State Department). Rhetoric degree from Uppsala. Currently publishing analysis on democracy and geopolitics reaching 200,000+ views. Founded Heartspace in 2021.
